nasb.text: So they came in a hurry and found their way to Mary and Joseph, and the baby as He lay in the manger.

esv.text: And they went with haste and found Mary and Joseph, and the baby lying in a manger.

cnv.text: 他們急忙去了，找到馬利亞、約瑟和那臥在馬槽裡的嬰孩。

ccb.text: 他们就连忙进城，找到了玛丽亚和约瑟以及躺在马槽里的婴孩。

csbs.text: 于是他们急忙赶去，找到了玛丽亚、约瑟和那躺在马槽里的婴孩。
